steps: Go to https://uptimerobot.com and log in or create a free account
In the left sidebar, click 'Integrations & API'
Click 'Create Main API Key' to generate an account-wide API key
Optionally create monitor-specific API keys for limited access
Copy the API key — it will be included in the request body (not headers) for all API calls

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: UptimeRobot API key. Sent in the POST request body as 'api_key' parameter, not in headers

notes: Free tier: up to 50 monitors, 5-minute check intervals
All API requests use POST method — the API key goes in the request body, not headers
Main API key gives full account access; monitor-specific keys limit access to one monitor
API rate limits: 10 req/min on free, up to 5,000 req/min on Pro

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account details and monitor limits (POST with api_key in body)
